Featured Projects

All projects

Salesforce CPQ Implementation

Led end-to-end implementation of Salesforce CPQ (Steelbrick) for a Fortune 500 manufacturing company, reducing quote generation time by 75% and eliminating pricing errors through automated product rules and approval workflows.

Salesforce CPQ Apex Lightning

MuleSoft API Integration Platform

Designed and built an enterprise integration platform using MuleSoft Anypoint Platform, connecting Salesforce CRM with SAP ERP, a custom billing system, and multiple third-party SaaS applications through a unified API gateway.

MuleSoft API Integration Salesforce SAP

Development February 8, 2024

Apex Triggers: Best Practices for Bulk Processing

Learn how to write efficient, scalable Apex triggers that handle bulk data operations without hitting Salesforce governor limits. Includes the trigger handler framework pattern.
